scripts.text:
TRUNCATE TABLE [EDW_FCST].[DIM_ADJUSTMENT_SEASONALITY];


SELECT 
A.CalendarDate,
B.Division,
B.BranchID,
B.ProductID
INTO #T_DIV_PROD_BRANCH
FROM
	(SELECT DISTINCT CalendarDate  FROM [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_ACTUAL] ) A
	JOIN 
	(SELECT DISTINCT DIVISION,BranchID,ProductID FROM [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_ACTUAL] 
	WHERE BranchID IS NOT NULL) B
	ON 1=1;



INSERT INTO [EDW_FCST].[DIM_ADJUSTMENT_SEASONALITY]


SELECT 
Division,
BranchID,
ProductID,
CalendarDate_EOM AS CalendarDate,
--PCT_NET_ISSUED,
--NET_ISSUED_PCT_12,
--PCT_NET_ISSUED_24,
--PCT_NET_ISSUED_36,
CAST(

(
        ISNULL(PCT_NET_ISSUED, 0) +
        ISNULL(NET_ISSUED_PCT_12, 0) +
        ISNULL(PCT_NET_ISSUED_24, 0) +
        ISNULL(PCT_NET_ISSUED_36, 0)
    ) / 
    NULLIF(
        (CASE WHEN PCT_NET_ISSUED IS NOT NULL AND PCT_NET_ISSUED!=0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
        (CASE WHEN NET_ISSUED_PCT_12 IS NOT NULL AND NET_ISSUED_PCT_12!=0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
        (CASE WHEN PCT_NET_ISSUED_24 IS NOT NULL AND PCT_NET_ISSUED_24!=0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
        (CASE WHEN PCT_NET_ISSUED_36 IS NOT NULL AND PCT_NET_ISSUED_36!=0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),
        0
    )  
	AS DECIMAL(8,4) )	AS SEASONALITY_ADJ, -- Pct Increate AVG of Last 4 Years

GETDATE() AS LastUpdatedTS
FROM
(	
	
	SELECT 
	DIVISION,
	BranchID,
	ProductID,
	CalendarDate_EOM,
	PCT_NET_ISSUED ,
	LAG(PCT_NET_ISSUED,12) OVER (PARTITION BY DIVISION,BranchID,ProductID ORDER BY CalendarDate_EOM) AS NET_ISSUED_PCT_12,
	LAG(PCT_NET_ISSUED,24) OVER (PARTITION BY DIVISION,BranchID,ProductID ORDER BY CalendarDate_EOM) AS PCT_NET_ISSUED_24,
	LAG(PCT_NET_ISSUED,36) OVER (PARTITION BY DIVISION,BranchID,ProductID ORDER BY CalendarDate_EOM) AS PCT_NET_ISSUED_36
	FROM
	(
		SELECT 
		DIVISION,
		BranchID,
		ProductID,
		CalendarDate_EOM,
		--NET_ISSUED,
		--NET_ISSUED_LM,
		CASE WHEN  NET_ISSUED_LM=0 THEN 0 ELSE NET_ISSUED*1.00/NET_ISSUED_LM*1.00 END AS PCT_NET_ISSUED
		FROM 
		(
			SELECT 
			DIVISION,
			BranchID,
			ProductID,
			CalendarDate_EOM,
			NET_ISSUED,
			LAG(NET_ISSUED,1) OVER (PARTITION BY DIVISION,BranchID,ProductID ORDER BY CalendarDate_EOM) AS NET_ISSUED_LM
			FROM
			(
				SELECT 
				A.DIVISION,
				A.BranchID,
				A.ProductID,
				EOMONTH(A.CalendarDate) AS CalendarDate_EOM,
				AVG(COALESCE(B.NET_ISSUED,0)) AS NET_ISSUED
				FROM #T_DIV_PROD_BRANCH A 
				LEFT JOIN [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_ACTUAL] B 
				ON A.Division = B.DIVISION
				AND A.CalendarDate = B.CalendarDate
				AND A.BranchID = B.BranchID
				AND A.ProductID = B.ProductID
				WHERE A.CalendarDate>='2019-01-01'
				GROUP BY EOMONTH(A.CalendarDate),
				A.DIVISION,
				A.BranchID,
				A.ProductID
				) M1
			) M2
		) M3
		
	) M4;


/*
UPDATE [EDW_FCST].[DIM_ADJUSTMENT_SEASONALITY] SET SEASONALITY_ADJ = 1.00 WHERE CalendarDate='2025-01-31'  ;
UPDATE [EDW_FCST].[DIM_ADJUSTMENT_SEASONALITY] SET SEASONALITY_ADJ = 1.00 WHERE CalendarDate='2025-02-28'  ;
UPDATE [EDW_FCST].[DIM_ADJUSTMENT_SEASONALITY] SET SEASONALITY_ADJ = 1.00 WHERE CalendarDate='2025-03-31'  ;
UPDATE [EDW_FCST].[DIM_ADJUSTMENT_SEASONALITY] SET SEASONALITY_ADJ = 1.00 WHERE CalendarDate='2025-04-30'  ;
UPDATE [EDW_FCST].[DIM_ADJUSTMENT_SEASONALITY] SET SEASONALITY_ADJ = 1.00 WHERE CalendarDate='2025-05-31'  ;
UPDATE [EDW_FCST].[DIM_ADJUSTMENT_SEASONALITY] SET SEASONALITY_ADJ = 1.00 WHERE CalendarDate='2025-06-30'  ;
UPDATE [EDW_FCST].[DIM_ADJUSTMENT_SEASONALITY] SET SEASONALITY_ADJ = 1.00 WHERE CalendarDate='2025-07-31'  ;
*/

--Override SEASONALITY_ADJ

UPDATE [EDW_FCST].[DIM_ADJUSTMENT_SEASONALITY] SET SEASONALITY_ADJ = 1.00 ;
